# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: control-plane.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdServer

spec:
  authPolicy:
    serverAuthorization:
      - policyName: default-allow-all
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.name: microservice-a

---
apiVersion: control-plane.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization

metadata:
  name: default-allow-all

spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: http
      allowFrom:
        - selector:
            matchLabels:
              io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.name: microservice-b

---
apiVersion: control-plane.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization

metadata:
  name: service-account-auth

spec:
  serviceAccountSelector:
    matchLabels:
      io.kubernetes.internal.serviceaccount.namespace: microservices-namespace

  ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: http
      allowFrom:
        - selector:
            matchLabels:
              io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.name: microservice-c

---
apiVersion: control-plane.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdService

metadata:
  name: microservice-a

spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: http

  selectors:
    io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.name: microservice-a

---
apiVersion: control-plane.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdService

metadata:
  name: microservice-b

spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: http

  selectors:
    io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.name: microservice-b

---
apiVersion: control-plane.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdService

metadata:
  name: microservice-c

spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: http

  selectors:
    io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.name: microservice-c
